languages.text: "Нет, Нунциус, это звучит, как чрезмерное допущение. Мы не можем принять за истину то, что вся биосфера Януса являет собой единый организм, подобным образом проявляющий иммунную реакцию на некий раздражитель. Использовать догадки вместо фактов недопустимо".

"No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."
languages.original_text: "Нет, Нунциус, это звучит, как чрезмерное допущение. Мы не можем принять за истину то, что вся биосфера Януса являет собой единый организм, подобным образом проявляющий иммунную реакцию на некий раздражитель. Использовать догадки вместо фактов недопустимо".

traits.locale_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too much of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

"No, Nuncius, that sounds like too much of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

"No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

"No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

languages.text: «No, Nuncius, eso me parece una suposición desmedida. No podemos aceptar como hecho que toda la biosfera de Janus sea un solo organismo que ejerza una respuesta inmune a un estímulo de este modo. Confiar en conjeturas en lugar de datos comprobados es inaceptable».
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: «No, Nuncius, eso me parece una suposición desmedida. No podemos aceptar como hecho que toda la biosfera de Janus sea un solo organismo que ejerza una respuesta inmune a un estímulo de este modo. Confiar en conjeturas en lugar de datos comprobados es inaceptable».

languages.text: “不，努恩修斯，这个推论听起来太过武断。我们目前还无法确定加努斯整个生物圈就是单一的生命体，并且会以这种方式对外界刺激作出免疫反应。用臆测代替经过验证的数据，是不可接受的。”
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: “不，努恩修斯，这个推论听起来太过武断。我们目前还无法确定加努斯整个生物圈就是单一的生命体，并且会以这种方式对外界刺激作出免疫反应。用臆测代替经过验证的数据，是不可接受的。”

languages.text: "Nein, Nuncius, das klingt zu sehr nach einer Vermutung. Wir können nicht postulieren, dass die gesamte Biosphäre von Janus ein einziger Organismus ist, der auf diese Weise mit einer Immunreaktion auf einen Stimulus reagiert. Auf Spekulationen anstelle von belegten Daten zu bauen, ist inakzeptabel."
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: "Nein, Nuncius, das klingt zu sehr nach einer Vermutung. Wir können nicht postulieren, dass die gesamte Biosphäre von Janus ein einziger Organismus ist, der auf diese Weise mit einer Immunreaktion auf einen Stimulus reagiert. Auf Spekulationen anstelle von belegten Daten zu bauen, ist inakzeptabel."

languages.text: « Non, Nuncius, cette supposition va un peu trop loin. Nous ne pouvons pas considérer comme un fait établi que la biosphère de Janus dans son ensemble n'est qu'un seul organisme manifestant de cette manière une réponse immunitaire à tel ou tel stimulus. S'en remettre à des conjectures plutôt qu'à des données prouvées est une méthode inacceptable. »
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: « Non, Nuncius, cette supposition va un peu trop loin. Nous ne pouvons pas considérer comme un fait établi que la biosphère de Janus dans son ensemble n'est qu'un seul organisme manifestant de cette manière une réponse immunitaire à tel ou tel stimulus. S'en remettre à des conjectures plutôt qu'à des données prouvées est une méthode inacceptable. »

languages.text: "Hayır Nuncius, bu çok büyük bir varsayım gibi. Janus'un tüm biyosferinin, bir uyarana bu şekilde bağışıklık tepkisi gösteren tek bir organizma olduğunu bir gerçek olarak kabul edemeyiz. Kanıtlanmış veriler yerine varsayımlara güvenmek kabul edilemez."
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır Nuncius, bu çok büyük bir varsayım gibi. Janus'un tüm biyosferinin, bir uyarana bu şekilde bağışıklık tepkisi gösteren tek bir organizma olduğunu bir gerçek olarak kabul edemeyiz. Kanıtlanmış veriler yerine varsayımlara güvenmek kabul edilemez."

languages.text: 「いいえ、ヌンシウス、それはあまりにも大きな仮定のように思えます。ジャヌスの生物圏全体が、刺激に対して免疫反応を示す単一の生物であるという事実を受け入れることはできません。証明されたデータではなく推測に頼ることは受け入れられません。」
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、ヌンシウス、それはあまりにも大きな仮定のように思えます。ジャヌスの生物圏全体が、刺激に対して免疫反応を示す単一の生物であるという事実を受け入れることはできません。証明されたデータではなく推測に頼ることは受け入れられません。」
